note: SYNTHESIZED, not captured. Prose is RPT-authored + scrambled placeholder; ST default utility strings are overridden with ORP_ sentinels so no ST prose appears. Pins the default marker ORDER (main -> worldInfoBefore -> charDescription -> charPersonality -> scenario -> worldInfoAfter -> chatHistory) AND ST per-marker FORMAT strings for an IMPORTED preset: wi_format `ORP_WI:\n{0}` wraps the WI (formatWorldInfo/stringFormat, openai.js:780-792), charDescription is BARE (openai.js:1369), personality_format/scenario_format expand `{{personality}}`/`{{scenario}}` (openai.js:1359-1360). Only ONE before_char WI entry is supplied so RPT (which has no per-entry before/after position and renders one combined blob at the before-slot) matches ST here; worldInfoAfter then renders empty and ST drops it (getChat, openai.js:3738-3739) → 6 messages. The before/after distinct-message SPLIT is a documented divergence (KNOWN-DIVERGENCES §7), deliberately not exercised here. Not adapter-verified until M5 (issue 20). Replace with a source:'captured' fixture per RUNBOOK.md when a real capture is taken.

input.description: worldInfoBefore/After, charPersonality, scenario markers each populated; single-char preset; one trailing user turn.

prompts.name: Main
prompts.content: Vornst kelbra directive: uphold the frelquam cadence.

character.name: Kaevo
character.description: Character brindle: Kaevo, a quiet dock-warden of Sill.
character.scenario: A rain-slick pier at the edge of Grennel Bay.

chatMessages.content: Kaevo, did the night skiff ever come back?

worldInfo.content: Before-lore: the Zell markets close at dusk-tide.

mustNotContain: point of view of {{user}}, using the chat history

chat.content: Vornst kelbra directive: uphold the frelquam cadence.
